summary: The diff shows ServicesPage.tsx has been fully rewritten with 10 new service categories (Fridge, Washing Machine, AC, Geyser, Induction Cooktop, Chimney, Liner, Wiring/Electrical, Microwave Oven, Aqua Guard Filter), each with bilingual English/Bengali labels and correct sub-services. All old service entries are removed, and the page uses clean, professional language throughout. Both REQ-2 and REQ-3 appear to be well implemented.
